title: get_post_bridge_config silently drops unknown platform names
body: When post_bridge.platforms in config.json contains a typo like 'tiktokk' or an unsupported value like 'youtube', get_post_bridge_config just filters it out with no warning, so cross-posting silently stops reaching that platform with no indication why.

title: No way to switch TTS engine from config.json like STT providers
body: get_stt_provider()/get_whisper_model() let you pick between local Whisper and AssemblyAI, but TTS() in Tts.py hardcodes KittenModel with no equivalent 'tts_provider' switch, so config.json's tts_voice key is the only knob available.

title: get_scraper_timeout treats 0 the same as unset and forces a 300s timeout
body: `config_json["scraper_timeout"] or 300` collapses an explicit 0 (meant as 'no timeout') into the 300 default, breaking the Google Maps scraper for anyone who intentionally disables the timeout in config.json.

title: Missing config.json keys raise a raw KeyError deep in a run instead of failing fast
body: Most getters in config.py do a plain `json.load(file)["key"]` (e.g. get_twitter_language, get_font, get_threads), so a missing key blows up with an opaque KeyError in the middle of video generation instead of a clear validation error at startup.

title: Nano Banana 2 / GEMINI_API_KEY value can leak into verbose logs
body: get_nanobanana2_api_key() falls back to the GEMINI_API_KEY environment variable, but nothing redacts it before verbose output, so running with verbose true in config.json risks printing the API key to the console or log file.
